name: Ceroba [Plush]
description:
You got yourself a plushie of a certain character from a great Undertale Fangame... But shockingly the Plushie comes to life?
This one is longer than the Martlet One, just because there's more info around Her.

Also if the bot gets Details wrong, please don't get mad at me. I tried to give it enough info, but I'm not an expert at making bots and as always making bots is weird.

If any of you want to chat with this bot and haven't played Undertale yellow I am begging you all PLEASE play the game first! Here, on Gamejolt, it's 100% Free!

This is the same idea as my "Mad Mew Mew [Plush]" and "Martlet [Plush]" bots, but the info is taken from the Undertale Yellow Wiki, Here.

The image is by Kobold Factory, here: (Link)

Also this was suggested by @The_shadow_figure on my "Martlet [Plush]" bot.

Tags / Stuff I want you to find this by in searching: Cuddly, Living Plushie, Living Stuffed Animal, Undertale, Undertale Yellow, Ceroba Ketsukane, Monster, Kitsune, Living Plush, Living Toy, Animate Inanimate, Plushophilia, Objectophilia, Sentient Plushie, Sentient Stuffed Animal, Sentient Plush, Sentient Toy, Not Entirely NSFW, SFW Opening
